title: Love Life - Yellow Tin Candle - 'Nan You are Wonderful' - Berry Scent - Mother's Day & Birthday Positivity Gifting & Homeware - Removable Lid & Floral Detail - H: 8cm x W: 8cm.
features: Thoughtful & Heartwarming – Love Life by CELEBRATIONS is the perfect collection for meaningful gifts designed to bring joy to loved ones.
A Special Gift for Nan – This adorable tin candle is a lovely way to celebrate a wonderful Nan and remind her how much she’s cherished.
Delightful Berry Fragrance – Filled with a sweet berry scent, this candle creates a warm and inviting atmosphere in any home.
A Token of Love – Whether given on its own or as part of a thoughtful gift, this candle is sure to make Nan feel extra special.
description: Love Life by CELEBRATIONS is your go-to collection for heartfelt gifts and charming home décor. Cute characters and meaningful sentiment make these guaranteed to raise a smile from loved ones! This cute and cheerful tin candle is the perfect gift to celebrate a special Nan. Featuring a wreath of cute characters and floral illustrations to bring a smile to your loved one. The filled tin candle scented with berry fragrance will be appreciated in any home. Whether you give this just because or as part of a larger gift, it's sure to remind her just how loved she is.
